summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 48 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 241 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 132 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 37 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 47 days past due with 48 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $37,783 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 47 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **41 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 45 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $15,610 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 37 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **80 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $20,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 35 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $35,924 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **29 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,743 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 7 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $23,588 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.

316 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **273 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 92 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$96,960 in payments going out this week** across 58 tasks — make sure funds are available. $111,410 expected in from 9 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 37 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **80 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 95 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. 7 payment tasks need Operations attention. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 payment tasks need Operations attention. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 48 overdue (oldest: 47d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 45 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 47 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **41 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 31 overdue (oldest: 35d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 6 overdue (oldest: 19d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **29 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
